impact: This advances the PP&D DevHub automation plan by adding a redacted, fixture-only workflow snapshot for FCC wireless draft review, covering semantic selectors, required fields, uploads, validation, save-for-later state, and exact confirmation gates before any live authenticated automation.
summary: Add a deterministic mocked DevHub FCC wireless application draft review snapshot fixture and focused validation test.
target_task: Task checkbox-117: Add a mocked DevHub workflow snapshot fixture for FCC wireless application draft review that records semantic selectors, required fields, upload controls, validation messages, save-for-later state, and exact confirmation gates using only redacted values.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
